text:
Rosalie Dumarque is the protagonist of Garrison Girl: An Attack on Titan Novel. She is a member of the Survey Corps and a former member of the Garrison.

Appearance

Rosalie has an athletic build and wears her long blonde hair in a braid. She looks younger than her actual age of sixteen and has a habit of fidgeting.

When Rosalie arrives in Trost District for the first time, she is wearing her white Royal Military Academy dress uniform with a high-neck dress shirt beneath it. It is something suitable for wearing as part of a parade, but not for active duty. After Rosalie's first day with her new squad goes poorly and she gets Titan blood on her academy uniform, she throws it away and switches to the standard Garrison one.
